seo.title: Warwick NY Real Estate | Jin Pang
seo.description: Search homes for sale in Warwick, NY. Waterfront village, top schools, walkable downtown, 35 min to NYC. Expert local real estate guidance.

name: Warwick
tagline: Village Charm on Long Island Sound
overview: Warwick is Southern Orange County's most beloved waterfront village. Tree-lined streets, a charming walkable downtown packed with independent restaurants and boutiques, and direct access to Long Island Sound make this one of the most desirable communities in the region. The Metro-North New Haven Line connects to Grand Central in about 35 minutes.
